creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
When trying to add whu@ as CC for PR 196744, I received an error that the associated address does not exist:

CC: whu@freebsd.org did not match anything 

However, the account definitely does exist.

gjb@nucleus:~ % finger whu@freebsd.org
[freebsd.org]
Trying 2001:1900:2254:206a::50:0...
Login: whu                              Name: Wei Hu
Directory: /home/whu                    Shell: /usr/local/bin/bash
No Mail.
No Plan.
